creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text: FreeBSD 14.0-STABLE stable/14-n266312-78e5cafd6dd0 with openvpn-2.6.8_1 installed utilising DCO acceleration blocks IPv4 SSH access over IPv6 tunnel when both ends use DCO. Disabling DCO on at least one endpoint unbreaks SSH IPv4 connectivity over IPv6 established tunnnel.
